title: Shillong、Meghalaya — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Shillong、Meghalaya的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Shillong是Meghalaya的一個城市，人口約450,000。The capital of Meghalaya, known as the Scotland of the East for its rolling hills, waterfalls, and pleasant year-round climate.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
